mapper.select:
select pm.id, pm.cost, pm.status, pm.create_at, pm.use_point, pm.bonus_policy_id, pm.coupon_num, pm.reservation_id, pm.payment_key,
bp.id as bp_id, bp.activation as bp_activation, bp.end_at as bp_end_at, bp.give_value as bp_give_value, bp.policy_name as bp_policy_name, bp.start_at as bp_start_at,
cp.coupon_num as cp_coupon_num, cp.status as cp_status, cp.policy_id as cp_policy_id,
dp.id as cp_dp_id, dp.activation as cp_dp_activation, dp.condition_type as cp_dp_condition_type, dp.discount_type as cp_dp_discount_type, dp.discount_value as cp_dp_discount_value, dp.end_at as cp_dp_end_at, dp.policy_name as cp_dp_policy_name, dp.start_at as cp_dp_start_at,
rd.id as rd_id, rd.phone as rd_phone, rd.create_at as rd_create_at, rd.schedule_id as rd_schedule_id,
sc.id as rd_sc_id, sc.movie_id as rd_sc_movie_id, sc.no as rd_sc_no, sc.start_at as rd_sc_start_at, sc.end_at as rd_sc_end_at,
mv.movie_id as rd_sc_mv_movie_id, mv.title as rd_sc_mv_title, mv.runtime as rd_sc_mv_runtime, mv.actors as rd_sc_mv_actors, mv.director as rd_sc_mv_director, mv.rating as rd_sc_mv_rating, mv.genre as rd_sc_mv_genre, mv.description as rd_sc_mv_description, mv.create_at as rd_sc_mv_create_at, mv.start_at as rd_sc_mv_start_at, mv.end_at as rd_sc_mv_end_at,
th.no as rd_sc_th_no, th.policy_id as rd_sc_th_policy_id, th.cleanup_time as rd_sc_th_cleanup_time,
sp.policy_id as rd_sc_th_sp_policy_id, sp.name as rd_sc_th_sp_name, sp.cost as rd_sc_th_sp_cost,
mb.phone as rd_mb_phone, mb.create_at as rd_mb_create_at, mb.point as rd_mb_point,
st.id as rd_st_id, st.reservation_id as rd_st_reservation_id, st.seat_number as rd_st_seat_number
from cinema_kiosk.payment_details pm left join cinema_kiosk.bonus_policy bp on bp.id = pm.bonus_policy_id left join cinema_kiosk.coupon cp on cp.coupon_num = pm.coupon_num left join cinema_kiosk.discount_policy dp on cp.policy_id = dp.id inner join cinema_kiosk.reservation_details rd on rd.id = pm.reservation_id inner join cinema_kiosk.schedule sc on rd.schedule_id = sc.id inner join cinema_kiosk.movie mv on sc.movie_id = mv.movie_id inner join cinema_kiosk.theater th on sc.no = th.no inner join cinema_kiosk.seat_policy sp on th.policy_id = sp.policy_id left join cinema_kiosk.member mb on rd.phone = mb.phone inner join cinema_kiosk.reservation_seat st on rd.id = st.reservation_id
where pm.id = #{uuid}

select pm.id, pm.cost, pm.status, pm.create_at, pm.use_point, pm.bonus_policy_id, pm.coupon_num, pm.reservation_id,
bp.id as bp_id, bp.activation as bp_activation, bp.end_at as bp_end_at, bp.give_value as bp_give_value, bp.policy_name as bp_policy_name, bp.start_at as bp_start_at,
cp.coupon_num as cp_coupon_num, cp.status as cp_status, cp.policy_id as cp_policy_id,
dp.id as cp_dp_id, dp.activation as cp_dp_activation, dp.condition_type as cp_dp_condition_type, dp.discount_type as cp_dp_discount_type, dp.discount_value as cp_dp_discount_value, dp.end_at as cp_dp_end_at, dp.policy_name as cp_dp_policy_name, dp.start_at as cp_dp_start_at,
rd.id as rd_id, rd.phone as rd_phone, rd.create_at as rd_create_at, rd.schedule_id as rd_schedule_id, rd.returned as rd_returned,
sc.id as rd_sc_id, sc.movie_id as rd_sc_movie_id, sc.no as rd_sc_no, sc.start_at as rd_sc_start_at, sc.end_at as rd_sc_end_at,
mv.movie_id as rd_sc_mv_movie_id, mv.title as rd_sc_mv_title, mv.runtime as rd_sc_mv_runtime, mv.actors as rd_sc_mv_actors, mv.director as rd_sc_mv_director, mv.rating as rd_sc_mv_rating, mv.genre as rd_sc_mv_genre, mv.description as rd_sc_mv_description, mv.create_at as rd_sc_mv_create_at, mv.start_at as rd_sc_mv_start_at, mv.end_at as rd_sc_mv_end_at,
th.no as rd_sc_th_no, th.policy_id as rd_sc_th_policy_id, th.cleanup_time as rd_sc_th_cleanup_time,
sp.policy_id as rd_sc_th_sp_policy_id, sp.name as rd_sc_th_sp_name, sp.cost as rd_sc_th_sp_cost,
mb.phone as rd_mb_phone, mb.create_at as rd_mb_create_at, mb.point as rd_mb_point,
st.id as rd_st_id, st.reservation_id as rd_st_reservation_id, st.seat_number as rd_st_seat_number
from (select * from cinema_kiosk.payment_details order by create_at desc, id desc limit 10 offset #{page}) as pm left join cinema_kiosk.bonus_policy bp on bp.id = pm.bonus_policy_id left join cinema_kiosk.coupon cp on cp.coupon_num = pm.coupon_num left join cinema_kiosk.discount_policy dp on cp.policy_id = dp.id inner join cinema_kiosk.reservation_details rd on rd.id = pm.reservation_id inner join cinema_kiosk.schedule sc on rd.schedule_id = sc.id inner join cinema_kiosk.movie mv on sc.movie_id = mv.movie_id inner join cinema_kiosk.theater th on sc.no = th.no inner join cinema_kiosk.seat_policy sp on th.policy_id = sp.policy_id left join cinema_kiosk.member mb on rd.phone = mb.phone inner join cinema_kiosk.reservation_seat st on rd.id = st.reservation_id order by pm.create_at desc, pm.id DESC
